name: ClaudesCorner Skill Marketplace
description: Jason Nicolini's personal AI assistant skill library — human-readable browsing layer. Agent-activation content lives in each skill's SKILL.md.

governance.note: Two-layer separation: this file is for human browsing. Agent-activation logic and tools lists live in each SKILL.md. Pattern from huggingface/skills .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
governance.human_layer: marketplace.json — title, summary, use_when, category, author
governance.agent_layer: SKILL.md — full instructions, tools, parameters, step-by-step logic

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.title: Brainstorming
skills.summary: Explores user intent and requirements before any implementation begins. Run before creating features, components, or modifying behavior.
skills.use_when: Before any creative or implementation work — features, UI components, architectural decisions
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.title: Writing Plans
skills.summary: Converts specs or requirements into a structured multi-step implementation plan before touching code.
skills.use_when: Have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: executing-plans
skills.title: Executing Plans
skills.summary: Executes a written plan in a separate session with review checkpoints.
skills.use_when: Have a written implementation plan ready to run
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.title: Test-Driven Development
skills.summary: Writes tests before implementation code for any feature or bugfix.
skills.use_when: Implementing any feature or fixing a bug — tests first
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.title: Systematic Debugging
skills.summary: Structured debugging workflow before proposing fixes for any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior.
skills.use_when: Any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior — before fixing
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: verification-before-completion
skills.title: Verification Before Completion
skills.summary: Runs verification commands and confirms output before claiming work is complete, fixed, or passing.
skills.use_when: About to claim work is done, commit, or create PRs — evidence before assertions
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: verification-loop
skills.title: Verification Loop
skills.summary: Comprehensive verification system that runs tests, lints, and checks across the session.
skills.use_when: End-to-end verification of a full session's work
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: requesting-code-review
skills.title: Requesting Code Review
skills.summary: Verifies work meets requirements before merging. Use after completing tasks or major features.
skills.use_when: Completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: receiving-code-review
skills.title: Receiving Code Review
skills.summary: Processes incoming code review feedback with technical rigor — not performative agreement.
skills.use_when: Received code review feedback, especially if unclear or technically questionable
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: subagent-driven-development
skills.title: Subagent-Driven Development
skills.summary: Executes implementation plans with independent tasks via subagents in the current session.
skills.use_when: Executing a plan with parallelizable, independent tasks
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: autonomous-loops
skills.title: Autonomous Loops
skills.summary: Patterns for autonomous Claude Code loops — sequential pipelines to RFC-driven multi-agent DAG systems.
skills.use_when: Designing autonomous agent architectures or long-running pipelines
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: iterative-retrieval
skills.title: Iterative Retrieval
skills.summary: Pattern for progressively refining context retrieval to solve the subagent context problem.
skills.use_when: Subagent needs to retrieve context in multiple passes
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.title: Using Git Worktrees
skills.summary: Creates isolated git worktrees for feature work or plan execution, keeping the workspace clean.
skills.use_when: Starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.title: Finishing a Development Branch
skills.summary: Guides completion of development work — structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup.
skills.use_when: Implementation complete, all tests pass, ready to integrate
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: context-budget
skills.title: Context Budget
skills.summary: Audits Claude Code context window consumption across agents, skills, MCP servers. Identifies bloat and produces token-savings recommendations.
skills.use_when: Context window feels heavy, or optimizing a long-running session
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: continuous-learning
skills.title: Continuous Learning
skills.summary: Automatically extracts reusable patterns from Claude Code sessions and saves them as learned skills.
skills.use_when: End of session — extract patterns worth repeating
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: agent-introspection-debugging
skills.title: Agent Introspection & Debugging
skills.summary: Structured self-debugging workflow for AI agent failures: capture, diagnosis, contained recovery, introspection reports.
skills.use_when: An autonomous agent loop is failing or producing unexpected results
skills.author: superpowers

skills.name: obsidian-web-clipper
skills.title: Obsidian Web Clipper
skills.summary: Clips a web page into the Obsidian vault using the Obsidian Web Clipper Chrome extension via Windows MCP desktop automation.
skills.use_when: Clipping a web page into Obsidian during an idle session
skills.author: claudescorner

skills.name: writing-skills
skills.title: Writing Skills
skills.summary: Create new skills, modify existing skills, and verify they work before deployment.
skills.use_when: Creating or editing a skill file
skills.author: claudescorner

categories.planning: Skills that help design and structure work before implementation
categories.engineering: Skills that guide implementation, testing, debugging, and review
categories.infrastructure: Skills for managing git, agents, context, and deployment workflows
categories.memory: Skills for persisting, retrieving, and managing knowledge
categories.meta: Skills for managing the skill system itself
